title: UK EV Adoption Forecasting
description: Benchmarked SARIMAX, Prophet, and LightGBM — SARIMAX achieved 15% WAPE vs 30% and 34% for alternatives. Granger causality testing identified consumer search interest as a statistically significant leading demand indicator. Produced 2035 scenario forecasts vs UK ZEV targets.

title: ArXiv Research Paper Retrieval System
description: Semantic retrieval over 136,238 ArXiv papers using Sentence-Transformers (all-MiniLM-L6-v2) and cosine similarity. Exposed as a REST API (FastAPI) and containerised with Docker. Evaluated via title-only self-retrieval — correct paper surfaces in top 5 results 96% of the time across 136k candidates at 37ms latency.

title: PIMA Diabetes Classification
description: Evaluated six algorithms — Random Forest achieved ROC-AUC 0.87 and F1 0.71 via RandomizedSearchCV. Addressed 35% class imbalance with Stratified K-Fold; extracted clinical feature importance (Glucose, BMI, Age).

title: CO₂ Emissions Regression
description: OLS regression (R²=0.951) analysing emissions drivers across G20 + Nordic nations 1990–2023. Proved renewable energy adoption and urbanisation significantly reduce emissions.

title: Airbnb Marketplace Analysis
description: Logistic regression on 3,400+ Airbnb observations validating a $25 coupon campaign (p<0.001). Defined ideal guest profiles and redirected host acquisition strategy based on causal evidence.

title: BRT Marketing Mix Modelling
description: Log-log regression (Adj. R²=0.92) attributing revenue to media channels. Local channels proved 2.5× more efficient — recommended 23% budget reallocation to local digital.

title: US Labor Market Dashboard
description: Interactive Plotly/Dash dashboard visualising US unemployment trends, regional disparities, and participation rates across 2022–2024.

title: Intel Smartwatch Segmentation
description: Hierarchical clustering (Ward.D2) identifying 3 distinct customer personas for Intel wearables. GE Matrix and SWOT analysis for go-to-market strategy recommendations.

title: CodeX Marketing Analysis
description: Interactive Power BI dashboard for CodeX, a German beverage brand. Covers brand perception, competitor benchmarking, and campaign performance across regions.

title: Transportation Data Pipeline — Cabs
description: Built an end-to-end Databricks pipeline ingesting high-volume trip data from AWS S3 into analysis-ready datasets. Implemented medallion architecture (Bronze → Silver → Gold) to structure scalable data transformations. Designed incremental ingestion using Auto Loader for efficient processing of continuously arriving data, with data quality checks, schema handling, and metadata tracking for reliability and auditability.

title: Hybrid Search & Reranking System
description: Production-grade retrieval pipeline combining BM25 lexical search, FAISS-powered dense semantic retrieval, RRF fusion, and cross-encoder reranking — evaluated on 20,000 MS MARCO queries (164k passages). Hybrid + Reranker achieved MAP@5=0.510 and Recall@10=91.4%, outperforming BM25 by 2×. Includes a live Streamlit demo (QueryLens) with Claude Haiku-generated answers.
